prompt: High-end fantasy minimalist fashion editorial inside a snow-covered celestial ryokan floating above frozen mountains. Shot on Pentax 67II, 105mm lens, Portra 400 film pushed to 800. Medium three-quarter shot, quiet documentary realism with cinematic negative space. A young woman wearing an oversized cream Loro Piana knit layered under a flowing Rick Owens-inspired ceremonial coat, soft dark hair with silver frost-tipped strands, delicate silver talisman rings glowing faintly, sitting in seiza beside a floating black tea bowl. Muted white-grey palette, snowfall diffusion, realistic skin texture, steam haze, imperfect realism, ancient glowing sigils on the floor. Typography Logo: ✦ FROSTBOUND ORACLE ✦ “Silence Is A Form Of Magic”
